ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visual_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used for the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used for the visualization */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is public or private */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, API, CSV) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "is_activated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visual_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature configuration */,
  "visual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization this feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Min, Max) */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Steps to implement the feature */,
  "expected_output" TEXT /* Expected output from implementing the feature */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature type */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is customizable */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visual_features_visual_id FOREIGN KEY ("visual_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visual_features_feature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the feature does */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature type is a default option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "visual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and device information */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* User session ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_visual_id FOREIGN KEY ("visual_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature this configuration applies to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the visual element */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the visual element */,
  "default_min_value" REAL /* Default minimum value for the visual element */,
  "default_max_value" REAL /* Default maximum value for the visual element */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is the default setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES visual_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of template (e.g., chart, dashboard) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is a default option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
